overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a sunny red-paved sidewalk along an elevated highway, through a shaded graffiti-covered underpass, and into a trash-filled plaza beneath towering commercial buildings with holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with distinctive red pavement

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt crosses the path from right to left
begins following pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the red sidewalk next to an elevated highway, passing other pedestrians and observing the futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and black pants crossing the path
pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway structure with green metallic underside
distinctive red tiled pedestrian walkway with green metal railings
tropical palm trees lining the street median
large holographic advertisements on distant building facades
futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic city, with the camera walking along a distinctive red-paved sidewalk. An elevated highway ramp dominates the right side while palm trees and modern glass towers fill the background. The player passes pedestrians including one in a white shirt crossing the path and follows another in a red jacket.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with graffiti walls

events.description: moves from bright sunlight into deep shadow beneath the overpass
passes pedestrians in bright yellow and pink shirts walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass beneath the highway, graffiti visible on the concrete walls to the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow shirt walking toward the camera
pedestrian in pink shirt walking alongside the yellow-shirted pedestrian

entered.detail: concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art including red and green tags
massive concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
tall pillars supporting multiple digital advertisement screens showing various content

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a shaded underpass beneath the elevated highway, transitioning from bright sun to shadow. The left wall is covered in vibrant graffiti while massive support pillars line the right. Digital billboard pillars appear ahead, and the player passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass approaching intersection with commercial signage

events.description: approaching open intersection area under the highway interchange
blue sports car and other vehicles pass by on the road to the right
crossing the street at the intersection toward the commercial plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection beneath the highway, crossing the street while observing passing vehicles and distant buildings

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving beneath the overpass
pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing beneath the highway interchange
large commercial building with green neon 'softsys' signage visible in distance
speed limit sign showing 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an intersection beneath the highway, transitioning from the enclosed underpass to a more open area. Digital billboard pillars line the path while vehicles including a blue sports car pass on the right. The Softsys building becomes visible in the distance as the player crosses the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with scattered debris beneath towering billboards

events.description: enters open plaza area covered in trash bags and scattered debris
ground becomes increasingly littered with garbage bags and cardboard

agents.ego_description: walking through the trash-filled plaza, turning to observe the large WNS building and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent illuminated 'WNS' sign and 'WED 10PM' text
scattered garbage bags, cardboard boxes, and litter covering the plaza ground
bright pink and blue holographic advertisements mounted on the WNS building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide plaza littered with trash and debris, transitioning from the highway underpass to open sun. The WNS building dominates the left with bright holographic billboards, while the Softsys building remains visible. The area is devoid of pedestrians, creating a stark contrast with the earlier crowded sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, populated city sidewalk into a desolate, trash-strewn urban plaza. It begins on a sunny day along a red-paved walkway, moving past pedestrians and palm trees beneath the shadow of an elevated highway ramp. As the camera enters a shaded underpass, the bright light shifts to deep shadow, passing vibrant graffiti and massive support pillars. The scene then opens at an intersection where digital billboards line the path and a blue sports car passes by, revealing the Softsys building in the distance. Finally, the camera emerges from the underpass into the open sun of a wide plaza littered with debris, where the WNS building and its holographic billboards tower over a stark, empty square.
